global.description: The ad features a green background with product icons and promotional text.
global.main_message: Limited stock offer for a product at $4.99.

elements.label: Green background
elements.description: A solid green background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: BoltCart logo
elements.description: A simple logo featuring the text 'BoltCart' in a bold font, positioned at the top.

elements.label: Product icons
elements.description: Three minimalistic icons representing products, arranged horizontally in the center.

elements.label: Additional product icon
elements.description: An additional product icon, larger and positioned slightly above the center.

elements.label: Another product icon
elements.description: Another product icon, similar in style to the previous ones, positioned near the center.

elements.label: Small product icon
elements.description: A smaller product icon, positioned to the left of the center.

elements.label: Another small product icon
elements.description: Another small product icon, positioned to the right of the center.

elements.label: Limited stock text
elements.description: Text stating 'Limited stock' in a bold font, positioned at the bottom.

elements.label: Weekend offer text
elements.description: Text stating 'Only this weekend' in a smaller font, positioned below the main offer.

elements.label: Price tag
elements.description: A price tag displaying '$4.99' in a prominent font, positioned at the bottom.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A button with the text 'Try for free' in a bold font, positioned at the bottom.

elements.label: Additional text area
elements.description: An empty area at the top right, possibly for additional text or icons.

elements.label: Additional text area
elements.description: Another empty area at the top right, adjacent to the previous one.

elements.label: Additional text area
elements.description: An empty area at the bottom right, possibly for additional text or icons.

elements.label: Small decorative element
elements.description: A small decorative element positioned at the left side of the center.

elements.label: Main offer text
elements.description: The main offer text 'Limited stock Only this weekend' in a large, bold font.
elements.text_content: Limited stock Only this weekend $4.99 Try for free

elements.label: BoltCart logo
elements.description: The logo 'BoltCart' displayed prominently at the top.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, native, bright and minimalistic, limited stock offer.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, product icons are centered, and the main offer and CTA are at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: BoltCart, Limited stock, Only this weekend, $4.99, Try for free
